title: ayenia scorpiura
intro: Ayenia scorpiura, also known as the "Scorpion's Tail" or "Ayenia", is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ayenia scorpiura include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ayenia scorpiura is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or capsule form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
